title: CAST in WHERE clause causes inconsistent query results
key_bug_features: CAST function used in WHERE clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO users (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT * FROM users WHERE CAST(age AS TEXT) = '30';
SELECT * FROM users WHERE CAST(created_at AS INTEGER) IS NOT NULL;
